measurement: Per-pellet radial positions inside the SG aim circle, machine-read from the pellet markers (white circle = hit, red circle = core hit - owner-ruled semantics) in soda-twinkling-bunny's burst-2 near-band Hit-Rate-ON window
status: INDEPENDENT-METHOD CONFIRMATION of the pellet radial distribution - refutes the live centered-Gaussian decisively; consistent with uniform-per-area (the 16-cell fit's winner). Findings-only; NOTHING ENACTED.
window: video 46.5-62.5 (burst 2, near band, Hit Rate 38.91 ON)

method.pipeline: 60fps frame extraction -> aim-disc tracking (Hough on disc edge, red-glow seeded, linear interpolation across gaps) -> pellet-marker detection (matched annular filter for the grey-outlined white circles + closed-ring verification + grey-not-black darkness floor to reject popup digit holes + colour-neutrality to reject gold coins; red-filled-circle detection with circularity to reject the wedge-shaped binary hit markers) -> static-track association (markers are screen-fixed; moving objects fragment and are culled) -> spawn-time clustering into shots; radius measured from the spawn-frame disc centre

validationVsOwnerCount.machine: 15 shot events, 101 landed, 10 cores (plus 2 noise singletons dropped)
validationVsOwnerCount.structuralMatch: the window's UNIQUE 3-core shot appears at the right sequence position; core totals 10 vs 11; shot cadence ~0.67s with the reload gap at ~54-55.5s reproduced
validationVsOwnerCount.recall: ~0.70 on landed pellets - misses concentrate in (a) the first ~2 shots inside the Full-Burst-start explosion and (b) overlapping/touching markers that break the closed-ring test; both approximately radially unbiased
validationVsOwnerCount.provenanceFinding: this match PROVES the counted near_ON window is BURST 2 (video 47-62) - consistent with ownerCount.windowsCounted 'ranks 1-4'; the geometry handoff's earlier 'burst 2 still uncounted' line was stale/backwards (the uncounted extra-near window is burst 5, video 162-177)

result.reading: Centered Gaussian (the live cone's distribution shape) is decisively refuted by direct position measurement. Uniform-per-area sits at the KS acceptance boundary with a mild rim-shift, consistent with the 16-cell fit's k=1.04 once the ±5px disc-centre jitter (radial smear; 15% of radii spill past R) is accounted. Both independent methods - hand-counted rates (sg-drawn-geometry.json formalFit_16cell) and machine-measured positions (this file) - converge.

caveats: Recall ~0.70; radial smear from disc-centre interpolation jitter ~+-5px; radii beyond R clamped to R for the KS test.
Single window (near band, HR ON). Other bands/arms not yet machine-read - the pipeline scales to them if wanted.
Red-marker sample too small in this window (10) for a red-only radial statement.
